frontmatter.title: The category of cpos from a synthetic viewpoint
frontmatter.meta: MFPS ’97: Thirteenth Annual Conference on Mathematical Foundations of Progamming Semantics

@inproceedings{fiore-rosolini-1997-mfps, author = {Fiore, Marcelo P. and Rosolini, Giuseppe}, editor = {Brookes, Stephen D. and Mislove, Michael W.}, publisher = {Elsevier}, booktitle = {Thirteenth Annual Conference on Mathematical Foundations of Progamming Semantics, {MFPS} 1997, Carnegie Mellon University, Pittsburgh, PA, USA, March 23-26, 1997}, year = {1997}, doi = {10.1016/S1571-0661(05)80165-3}, pages = {133--150}, series = {Electronic Notes on Theoretical Computer Sciecnce}, title = {The category of cpos from a synthetic viewpoint}, volume = {6}, }
